name: Luminor Financial Holdings Limited
summary: Luminor Financial Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages principally in the development of integrated residential and commercial properties in the People's Republic of China and Singapore. It operates through Property Development, Property Management, and Rental segments. The company develops residential, commercial, and other properties; provides property management, and other services; and leases properties held for sale. Its property development and management activities include site selection, land acquisition, project conceptualization, construction, sale, completion, and after-sale services. The company is also involved in the wholesale, import, and export of chemical products, office furniture, and clothing; provision of consultancy services on the enterprise management and business information; and sale of construction materials, decoration materials, and low voltage electronic apparatus. The company was formerly known as Starland Holdings Limited and changed its name to Luminor Financial Holdings Limited in April 2021. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Singapore. Luminor Financial Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of GRP Chongqing Land Pte Ltd.
